title: xerochrysum banksii
intro: Xerochrysum banksii, also known as the golden everlasting daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xerochrysum banksii include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Xerochrysum banksii can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to promote overall well-being.
